title: Was watching EoE and a few lines seemed to fit with 30
display_title: Was watching EoE and a few lines seemed to fit with 30
wikitext:
[]: Was watching EoE and a few lines seemed to fit with 3.0...             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sun Dec 14, 2014 9:24 am Just after the start of Third Impact, we see Seele 08 and 09 deliver these two lines Hmm, that's kinda close, could be translated differently to Infinity... Let's see, what's next... HMM!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Dec 14, 2014 10:55 am ^ I'm pretty sure that they used "eien" for eternity in EoE, while in ENT they chose to go with the English term "Infinity", so I guess in that case at least they might have made a deliberate distinction.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Dec 14, 2014 8:00 pm Not surprised Many compared Q to EoE !!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 16, 2014 2:51 pm Q is riddled with references to EoE. The ruins of Neo-Nerv really look as though the JSSDF attacked as they did in EoE, particularly with the bakelite flood in the Eva hanger and the craters from explosives and such. I'm really glad the Red Earth Purification Ceremony idea was reinvigorated with actual imagery of a red Earth in the Post-3I world. EDIT: here's another really good relevant thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15850/Evangelion-30-and-EoE-A-potential-parallel-connection/

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 16, 2014 3:17 pm ^ Well, Jo mirrors 1-6, Ha mirrors 8-19 and Q mirrors 24-EOE. The real question is, with nothing left to mirror, where will Final go?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 16, 2014 3:22 pm robersora wrote: ^ Well, Jo mirrors 1-6, Ha mirrors 8-19 and Q mirrors 24-EOE. The real question is, with nothing left to mirror, where will Final go?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 16, 2014 4:42 pm ^ Sometimes I really ask myself, how I always manag to overlook the most interesting contributions on the forums. Thank you, I'll read a little into it. As twisted as Xard represents himself on the forums, he is a pretty sharp thinker.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 8:37 am robersora wrote: ^ Well, Jo mirrors 1-6, Ha mirrors 8-19 and Q mirrors 24-EOE. The real question is, with nothing left to mirror, where will Final go?

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sat Dec 20, 2014 1:56 pm There are crazy amounts of references in Q with EoE. For example, Q has Eva 13, while EoE has 13 MP Evas that initiate instrumentality(with the 13th in the center of the geometry). I was going to make a separate thread on this but got lazy.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 20, 2014 10:02 pm unitM wrote: EoE has 13 MP Evas that initiate instrumentality

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Dec 21, 2014 3:06 am Reichu wrote: Hate to break it to you, but there are actually just nine.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Dec 21, 2014 7:58 am Flashing in which screen?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 21, 2014 8:50 am unitM wrote: Unit-13 flashing on the screen still seems suspicious.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 21, 2014 8:56 am UrsusArctos wrote: Same question that El Mariachi asked.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Dec 21, 2014 11:32 am I understand that, physically, they might not have numbered up to 13. Visually, in that one scene I am mentioning, there was an EVA-13. That one was shown to be in the center of the other MPs and in GNR's neck area(the sacred geometry lines up).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 21, 2014 12:21 pm unitM wrote: I understand that, physically, they might not have numbered up to 13. Visually, in that one scene I am mentioning, there was an EVA-13.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Jan 18, 2015 1:22 am ^ If Eva 13 is in the middle, which is where GNR's neck stump is, Gendo has the the Key of Nez. in the Rebuild series, which noticeably ends at the neck. There's a lot of neck imagery in Q too. I'm not offering a conclusion but rather am just pointing out these that are related and that I consider important. EDIT I have some important news folks. This is regarding EoE and the loop theory. In lesser terms, you could say this is a point for loop theorists. But in all reality, I showed my friend EoE last night and ran into this. When Shinji rejected instrumentality in EoE, all these MP Evas went pop with the spear they embedded in themselves. Then they floated away. We're given a clear shot of this one with it's core still there. But then, only 3 are shown to be descending towards earth. The other ones are nowhere to be seen in this scene. (The scene is pretty long too - even as the green instrumentality crosses rise, you still have a clear view of the sky, and you can easily see if anything else falls) There are 4 adams in the new series right? That's 3 MP Evas... the 4th would be unit 01. Why do I include 01? Because, assuming the core is intact, the MP Evas have a Rei in them. They all have Rei faces. This one in particular has five Reis in it. 4 Reis for 4 adams(though I have no clue to shoulder what I'm saying into a worthwhile theory) Bonus pic of Eva 01 looking like an Adam from the new short. \
summary:
[]: Was watching EoE and a few lines seemed to fit with 3.0...             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sun Dec 14, 2014 9:24 am Just after the start of Third Impact, we see Seele 08 and 09 deliver these two lines Hmm, that's kinda close, could be translated differently to Infinity... Let's see, what's next... HMM!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Dec 14, 2014
